title: Leptophytus leyseroides
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Leptophytus leyseroides.
taxonomy: Leptophytus leyseroides is a species of fern in the family Dipteridaceae. The genus Leptophytus is part of the leptosporangiate ferns, a group of ferns characterized by their sporangia being arranged in four rows on the underside of the frond. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and reproductive characteristics. The plant is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It is an epiphytic fern, growing on other plants for support.
